title: AnglesWorkflowContract
description: Input/output contract for the angle generation workflow stage. The stage receives a ContentBrief and ResearchPack and produces a set of distinct content angles.

input.description: Input to the angles stage: a normalized ContentBrief, a completed ResearchPack, and an optional cap on the number of angles to generate.

max_angles.description: Maximum number of content angles to generate. Each angle must be materially different in approach, not just wording. Defaults to 5 if not specified.

output.description: Output of the angles stage: a set of candidate content angles grounded in the research pack.

angles.description: List of generated content angles. Must contain at least one angle and no more than max_angles.
